description: Originally designed for boaters and fishermen to have a firm foothold even on slippery surfaces, crocs has gone a  long way in creating footwear for those who demand comfort. Replete with several benefits such as the shoe moulding to your feet using the body warmth, it's a hot favourite among most people. The midsole band found in all of crocs footwear is a tribute to the classic vulcanized style of yesteryear footwear. Incredibly easy to clean, Crocs makes for a great footwear when working in the garden or in wet and messy conditions. The speciality of these shoes are that they need to Fit loosely around the feet, such that neither the sides of the shoe nor the toe unit come in contact with the feet. Instead, there should be a quarter to half inch gap between the foot and the wall of the shoe, and you should be able to comfortably fit a finger between the heel and back strap.UpperEVA upper with textured inside for lightweight feel, comfort and durabilityDora explorer themed upper for added styleEVA material that moulds to the foot shape offering ample ergonomic comfortPerforations on the forefoot and the sides for ventilation and to drain away water Back strap to support the ankle and hold the foot in placeUpper moulded to midsole for comfort and protection of feet from abrasionBroad EVA lining along the midsole for enhanced durabilityBranding button on upper for styleMidsoleEVA footbed with horizontal and lines in the silhouette of the foot for ergonomic comfort and acupressureCrocs branding on mid heel for comfort and styleFungus, bacteria and odour resistant for a healthy wear even in wet conditionsMild heel cup on the footbed to support the heelOutsoleSlip resistant outsoleMulti-directional textured leaf-shaped grooves in the forefoot and backfoot for ample grip, stability and comfortShoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
